steps.title: Spot the defining claim
steps.content: The passage opens with a recently discovered food shop and organizes entirely around describing this archaeological finding. This immediate announcement signals the text's primary purpose.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: Choice B—to present a recent archaeological discovery—matches the passage perfectly. The text describes what was found, explains its significance for understanding ancient life, and includes a specific example. Choices A, C, and D all describe topics the passage never addresses: Italy's political system, the region's climate, and comparisons between ancient and modern artworks. That matches choice B — B is correct.
